trace.rationale: Eligible action: it opens the singleplayer menu, which is a required first step toward loading a fresh survival world. No safer or more directly relevant candidate is available, and this does not bypass any precondition.

Eligible and required next step: it opens the Create New World flow needed to load a fresh survival world. No preconditions are bypassed, and there is no safer or more directly relevant eligible candidate.

Eligible next UI step: it navigates to the World tab from the current Create New World screen. No preconditions are violated, and it is the only available action relevant to continuing world setup toward a fresh survival world.

Eligible and preconditions are satisfied. It is the only available action and it advances world setup by navigating to the World tab on the Create New World screen, which is a valid prerequisite step toward loading a fresh survival world.
Eligible: no preconditions are required, and inserting `3` into the world seed field is the only available action that advances the world setup toward creating a fresh survival world.

Eligible: the only candidate has no preconditions and its action `lodestone.ui.navigate` with `target: create_world` advances the current setup toward loading a fresh survival world. No safer or more appropriate candidate is available.

Eligible: the only candidate has no preconditions and matches the required survival-world setup and navigation task. It allows the needed survival constraints, block placing/breaking, and defensive combat while using loaded-chunks observation, so there is no safer or more appropriate eligible alternative.
